---
title: "Contact"
---


## Contact
- Email: yusufkurniaromadhon@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: [Yusuf Kurnia Romadhon](https://www.linkedin.com/in/yusuf-kurnia-romadhon-842049118/)
- GitHub: [yusufkurniar](https://github.com/yusufkurniar)

## Location
Melbourne, Australia (open to Dubai, Malaysia, Jakarta roles)
